root: ^Here is some sample dialogue entered into this system:

Sample_Hestia_x_Aelius: ^You did well today, Aelius. You’re learning fast.
^Thanks, Hestia. Did you speak with Hades about the issue with the supplies?
^Oh, you know how he is. Always putting out fires. Or starting them.
^If you keep putting it off, it’ll only get worse.
^I know, I know. I’ll do it the next time I see him.
^Promise. Now get going. I need to close up.
Sample_Zeus_x_Aelius: ^What did you say your name was?
^Zeus: Well, then, Aelius! Nice to meet you! I’m King of Olympus!
^Aelius: Sure. I’m actually trying to find someone, if you could-
^Zeus: Hold on, now, we’ve just met. Don’t go asking for favors already.
^Aelius: Sorry, sir, it’s just that I know how many children you have, and-
^Zeus: Child, you would do well to speak your next words carefully.
^Aelius: I think I might… um… have another customer.
Sample_Hephaestus_x_Aelius: ^Aelius: Sorry. I didn’t mean to stare.
^See a conversation from later in the game
Sample_Hephaestus_Aelius_x_mid_game: ^Hephaestus: I didn’t ask you to bring me food.
^Aelius: It’s on the house. I wanted to thank you.
^Aelius: For your kindness. I know you don’t give it out freely.
^Hephaestus: I don’t know what you mean.
Sample_Hermes_x_Aelius: ^Aelius: I bet. Here you go. Thanks for the delivery.
^Hermes: Thanks for the meal. Keep up the good work, kid.
Sample_Ares_x_Aelius: ^Aelius: Um, yeah. Why would I leave?
^Ares: Are you kidding? This place is falling apart! Why waste your time on it?
^Ares: I’m just saying you could do better.
^Ares: Come on! You’ve got the physique for it!
^Ares: Eh, suit yourself. The offer stands, though.
^Aelius: What can I get you, then?
